filters.q: (("Submission Started") OR ("Application Incomplete") OR ("Client File Closed") OR (Giggle) OR (BankBreezy) OR (funded) OR (approved) OR (under review)) newer_than:7d

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "source": "{{$json.source}}",
  "emailSubject": "{{$json.emailSubject}}",
  "applicantName": "{{$json.applicantName}}",
  "applicantEmail": "{{$json.applicantEmail}}",
  "phone": "{{$json.phone}}",
  "businessName": "{{$json.businessName}}",
  "routeDetected": "{{$json.routeDetected}}",
  "revenue": "{{$json.revenue}}",
  "bankType": "{{$json.bankType}}",
  "status": "{{$json.status}}",
  "firstReplySent": true,
  "messageId": "{{$json.messageId}}",
  "threadId": "{{$json.threadId}}",
  "notes": "Parsed from Gmail. Status suggests this applicant may already be in active follow-up."
}
